explorebycategorydescription: From ancient ruins to adventure sports, the Golan Heights offers something for every traveler
herodes: Ancient history, stunning nature, and unforgettable experiences await you in the most beautiful regions of Israel
exploreplacesdesc: Discover amazing attractions, restaurants, and experiences throughout the Golan Heights.
hoteldesc: Cozy retreats and snowy mountain views
viewpointdesc: Panoramic Hermon peaks and Birkat Ram vistas
footerdesc: Discover the breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and hidden gems of the Golan Heights with our premier guide services.
newsletterdesc: Subscribe to get special offers, free giveaways, and once-in-a-lifetime deals.

categoriesDesc.nature: Discover the natural beauty of the Golan Heights, with its stunning landscapes, waterfalls, and hiking trails.
categoriesDesc.food-drink: Discover the best restaurants and cafes in the Golan Heights, with a variety of cuisines and dining experiences.
categoriesDesc.activities: Discover the best activities in the Golan Heights, with a variety of options for all ages and interests.
categoriesDesc.stays: Discover the best places to stay in the Golan Heights, with a variety of options for all budgets and preferences.
categoriesDesc.scenic-spots: Discover the best scenic spots in the Golan Heights, with a variety of viewpoints and natural landscapes.

herocards.villagedesc: Explore Majdal Shams, Buq'ata, Mas'ada, and Ein Qiniyye. Experience authentic Druze culture, food, and local life.
herocards.hiddengemsdesc: Discover secret spots, quiet corners, and lesser-known sites across the Golan Heights that most visitors never find.
